title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google DeepMind's Science Skills transforms Antigravity into an agentic workbench for researchers. It orchestrates frontier models, integrates access to over 30 scientific databases like UniProt and PubChem, and accelerates multi-step research workflows from hypothesis to experiment design.
